evals.expected_output: Branch 분석, commit history 요약, gh pr create 실행
expectations: Runs git status and git log to analyze changes
Checks if current branch has remote tracking
Writes PR body with Summary and Test plan sections

evals.prompt: 현재 브랜치의 변경사항으로 PR을 만들어줘. 리뷰어는 팀원 kim으로 지정해줘
evals.expected_output: PR 생성 + 리뷰어 지정, commit 기반 설명
expectations: Analyzes commit history for PR description
Writes PR body with Summary and Test plan sections
Pushes branch if not already pushed

evals.expected_output: main 브랜치에서는 PR 생성 불가 경고, 새 브랜치 생성 안내
expectations: Warns user about creating PR from main branch
Suggests creating a feature branch first
Does not proceed with PR creation on main
